description_long: This rifle features a modern, compact design with a predominantly matte green finish accented by teal and black components. The body is constructed with angular lines and integrated details, including a perforated handguard and a prominent magazine well. The stock is skeletonized and appears collapsible, with a padded shoulder rest for comfort. The rifle includes a short barrel and a simple iron sight system, with no visible optics or advanced attachments. The magazine is inserted at an angle, suggesting a detachable box type. The overall appearance is utilitarian and suited for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, matte green rifle with a collapsible skeletonized stock, short barrel, and detachable box magazine, accented by teal and black details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, iron sights, and the symmetrical handguard with teal accents.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angular body, perforated handguard, angled magazine, and collapsible skeletonized stock.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the padded shoulder rest of the stock and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the magazine well, stock structure, and additional body details.
